ops.text: The codex CLI is deadlocked machine-wide mid-session: `codex --version` hangs (10s+), a minimal `echo | codex exec` emits zero events for 60s with no session rollout file created and zero network connections open, while `codex exec --help` (pure arg parsing) returns instantly and curl to api.openai.com is ~50ms. Two review invocations hung 20+ minutes each. Likely contention on the shared local state sqlite dbs (~/.codex/state_5.sqlite, logs_2.sqlite, memories_1.sqlite; chronicle/memories enabled) under concurrent codex processes from parallel agents. Cost tonight: two lost review rounds and an escalation of all codex-lane reviews to fable. Worth either serializing codex invocations across agents or isolating CODEX_HOME per agent.
